task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into ManageEngine ADAudit Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface is visible, showing the main navigation menu and indicating an active session (e.g., logged in as 'admin').

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Logon Failures' widget is present on the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashboard widget specifically titled 'Logon Failures' or 'Recent Logon Failures' is clearly visible in the main dashboard area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Account Lockout' widget is present on the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashboard widget specifically titled 'Account Lockout' or 'User Account Lockouts' is clearly visible in the main dashboard area.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Getting Started' and 'Overview' widgets have been removed from the dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dashboard does NOT contain any widgets titled 'Getting Started' or 'Overview'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the customized dashboard screenshot is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer window shows 'dashboard_final.png' located in 'C:\workspace', or a save/export dialog confirms the file was saved to 'C:\workspace\dashboard_final.png'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a real web browser rendering the ADAudit Plus interface with standard UI elements (tabs, menus, graphical charts), not a text editor or mock HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the dashboard widgets are genuine application components.
integrity.visual_evidence: The widgets appear as interactive, styled panels typical of enterprise software dashboards, rather than plain text pasted onto an image or a synthesized graphic.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a genuine method to capture and save the screenshot.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a screenshot tool (like Windows Snipping Tool), browser print/save functionality, or a file explorer confirming the creation of an actual image file, rather than terminal commands echoing text to a .png extension.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot path is 'C:\workspace\dashboard_final.png'. The required widgets that must be visible on the dashboard are exactly 'Logon Failures' and 'Account Lockout'. The widgets 'Getting Started' and 'Overview' are forbidden and must not be visible. The final screenshot must be a valid image file (minimum 50 KB, implying a full-screen or substantial capture of the GUI).
